name: Vegetarian Lasagne
recipeInstructions:
1. Gently fry the carrots and garlic in some butter. Set aside.
2. Gently fry the onions and mushrooms in some butter. Set aside.
3. Wash the spinach and cook gently in a saucepan without adding any water, stirring frequently. Add the corn to this mixture and set aside.
4. Make the white sauce: Melt the butter in a saucepan. Remove from heat, add the cornflour, and mix well. Slowly add the milk while continuously stirring. Return to heat and continue stirring until thickened.
5. Assemble the lasagne in an ovenproof dish at least 5 cm deep (about 20x30 cm for given quantities). Layer with lasagne, sauce, and one of the prepared vegetable pairs. Repeat the layers twice more, finishing with a layer of lasagne and sauce.
6. Top with cheese and sprinkle with paprika if desired.
7. Bake for approximately 35 minutes at 180°C.
8. Serve the portions whole as you serve them.
Author's Notes:
This vegetarian dish can be served alone or with a side salad. Thanks to Erica and Milica for developing this recipe by trying various vegetable combinations until the corn remained in place. Experiment with different vegetables based on season and preference.
